subject: [RFC PATCH v4 16/27] mm: NP_OPS_RECLAIM - private node reclaim participation

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Identified a potential issue with the reclaim policy callback not being properly reset after boosted reclaim. Requested that the author add a check to ensure the callback is cleared when the boost ends.

reviews.author: Zi Yan
reviews.summary: Agreed with David's concerns and suggested adding a check to clear the reclaim policy callback when the boost ends. Also pointed out that the patch needs to handle the case where the service is not opted into reclaim.

2026-02-22.patch_summary: This patch introduces a new reclaim policy for private nodes, allowing them to control the reclaim behavior of kswapd during watermark boosts. The policy is implemented through a callback function and a struct node_reclaim_policy that can be injected by each private node service. This change aims to address issues with boosted reclaim suppressing may_swap and may_writepage, as well as problems with __setup_per_zone_wmarks() unconditionally zeroing watermark_boost.
